{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Incarnate
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|When [[Simon]]'s chain is completed, he will either [[Incarnate]] or die.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate events]]
